'''Pesitiin''' was an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Pesitiin system/Legends|Pesitiin system]] with perpetual [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] storms<ref name="Galaxy Guide 2" />. Several years before [[400 BBY/Legends|400 BBY]]<ref>''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> its upper atmosphere housed a [[Bosken & Bosken]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] center which attempted to harvest the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] gases for profit, but it proved to be an unsustainable business due to the high cost of maintaining a floating mining center, leading to the abandonment of the outpost less then a decade after it was built.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 2">''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref>

==History==
[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] attempted to meet with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of Pesitiin to sign a peace treaty between the [[Imperial Remnant]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Pellaeon's invitation to Bel Iblis was intercepted by the forces of the traitorous [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]]; Disra also sent [[Cavrilhu Pirates]] disguised as Bel Iblis's forces to attack Pellaeon's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']].<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref> Despite Disra's efforts, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was able to learn of Pellaeon's plans, and met the Admiral at Pesitiin before he left, establishing the preliminary diplomatic groundwork for what eventually became the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty]].<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>
